description.en: The application layer protocol powering the World Wide Web. A text-based request/response protocol for transferring HTML, APIs, files and other resources.
description.zh: 驱动万维网的应用层协议。基于文本的请求/响应协议，用于传输HTML、API、文件等资源。

payload.en: Raw HTTP message (text-based, not suited for bit-level parsing)
payload.zh: 原始HTTP报文 (文本协议，不适合位级解析)
